name: Meat Sauce Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the vegetable shortening in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and garlic to the skillet. Cook until the onions are golden brown.
3. Add celery and carrots (if using) to the skillet. Stir occasionally.
4. Add ground beef to the skillet. Break up any clumps of meat and stir until the meat is fully browned.
5. Stir in salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, and "hot" ketchup. Mix well.
6. Cover the skillet and simmer over low heat for 20 minutes.
7. Remove excess fat from the mixture using a spoon or ladle.
8. Cool the mixture completely to room temperature.
9. Once cooled, transfer the mixture into five separate one-pint containers, leaving about half an inch of space at the top of each container.
10. Cut through the mixture with a knife several times to remove any air pockets.
11. Seal the containers tightly and label them as "MEAT SAUCE MIX".
12. Store the containers in the freezer. Use within three months for best quality.
